title: MAVDP Engine Telemetry
description: Normalized telemetry output for all MAVDP domain engines

target_id.description: Unique identifier for the target being tested

engine_type.description: The type of engine reporting the telemetry

coverage_delta.description: New coverage discovered (e.g., block hash or line count increment)

crash_hash.description: Unique hash for deduplicating the crash (e.g., stack trace hash)

exploitability_score.description: Preliminary exploitability score calculated by the engine

reproduction_input.description: Base64 encoded input or path to file that reproduces the finding

metadata.description: Engine-specific metadata (e.g., register state, HTTP request/response)
